column1: # Solenhofen limestone σ_c(T) regime-transition stress per T-bin
# Extracted from Schmid 1976 Table I (45 runs) + Table II (Arrhenius LSQ fits) + page T26 (transition-stress values)
# σ_c = transition stress between high-n (n≈4.5) and low-n (n≈2) power-law creep regimes
# 600°C + 900°C values stated explicitly in paper text (page T26: "300 bars at 900°C to 1050 bars at 600°C")
# 700°C + 800°C values interpolated from Table I regime-2 (lowest σ) vs regime-3 (highest σ) boundary
# Solenhofen limestone grain size ~1-10 µm; confining pressure 3 kbar
